title: Loctite 2097695 60 Seconds Universal Glue/Fast and Repositionable/Ideal for Larger Surfaces and Non-Porous Materials / 1 Pack (1 x 20g)
features: Non-drip gel formula: can be used for vertical applications and is easy to apply thanks to its thickness and nozzle applicator
Flexible and solvent-free: the universal adhesive can even be used on non-porous materials and dries transparent
Repositionable within 40 seconds: which makes it ideal for repairs at home
Extra strong: Loctite 60 seconds reaches an adhesive power of up to 100 kg/m² within 24 hours and is ideally suited for larger surfaces
Delivery contents: 1 x 20g non-drip glue suitable for wood, metal, leather, ceramic, stone, rubber, and plastic (except for PE, PP and PTE)
description: From the manufacturer Key Features: Bonds material within 60 seconds. Gives you time to reposition parts. Dries transparent. Solvent free. The Obvious Repair Solution Fast, strong and easy. Loctite '60 Seconds' is an extra-strong all-purpose glue that only takes 60 seconds to dry. No more waiting and no more clamping! Ideal for all your repairs at home including large surfaces. Non-drip gel formulation for vertical applications. Multimaterials, also flexible ones. Use on most materials. Thanks to its tailored, ultra-thick gel formula, Loctite '60 Seconds' is strong on most materials - including wood, metal and plastic (except PE, PP, PTE). Ultra thick gel-formula. The gel formula expertly bonds non-porous materials in just 60 seconds, whilst giving the user around 40 seconds to reposition any difficult to glue objects. Easy to use. 1. Shake tube before use. Ensure all surfaces to be bonded are clean and dry. 2. Apply a small amount of adhesive to one surface only. 3. Press the surfaces together and hold until set. Actual bonding time depends on material. 4. Replace cap immediately and store the pack in a cool, dry place. Wide range of features. Loctite '60 Seconds' has a wide range of versatile features, making all home repairs feasible in up to just one minute, meaning it's an easy product for practically anyone to use - not just professionals.
